Problems with group and lab printers should be reported to that group's IT support. Getting Help For building maintenance, safety and repair, use our building request form . For after-hours access issues, please contact UCPD using their non-emergency phone number: 510-642-6760 . Campus Emergency Information: what do do in a variety of emergencies. General administrative services offered by the EECS Department and CS Division main offices in 253 Cory Hall and 387 Soda Hall: room access, lost & found, paper mail, etc. Space and Facilities Policies EECS Department Space Policy EECS Construction and Modification Policy Cory Hall Space Policy Soda Hall Space Policy Principles of Soda Hall Space Allocation Contact: soda-building@eecs.berkeley. edu cory-building@eecs.berkeley. edu Managing Grad Student Assigned Spaces Space Occupant List Report Space Confirmation Page for Grad Students Gender Neutral Restrooms Berkeley EECS strives to support an inclusive environment. The following locations feature gender-neutral restrooms for EECS faculty, staff, graduate students, and affiliates. Undergraduate students may request access by visiting the Soda Hall front desk between the hours of 8-11:30 am or 1-3:30 pm during regular business days. Soda Hall: 1st floor; rooms 178 and 182 4th floor; room 402 6th floor; room 608 Cory Hall: The 1st floor (single stall) restroom in Cory’s west hallway.
